detail: Unified sign-consistent consensus rule (up/down/mixed/ns-up/ns-down/flat): a gene where 2 datasets significantly disagree -> 'mixed' not a forced call; representative value sign always matches direction. Fixes 6 sign contradictions (MYF5,DOK7,MYH8,CSRP3,FLNC,BNIP3) and ESRRG/TFAM overcalls

detail: GSE167186 bulk RNA-seq group+age mapping (76 samples entering DE)
evidence: geo_get_series sample characteristics parsed per-sample. Of 93 series samples, 76 are bulk RNA-seq mapping to count columns X_*; bulk group sizes (printed 'group sizes (bulk): Old 29, Sarcopenia 24, Young 19, Unclassified 4'): Young n=19 (18-27y), Old-healthy n=29 (64-87y), Sarcopenia n=24 (67-92y), Unclassified n=4 (71-78y, excluded). Remaining 17 are single-nuclei-only samples absent from the bulk matrix. DE contrasts use Young=19 / Old=29 / Sarcopenia=24
